GenAiFunction.description:
Create, update, or delete SObject records in the org via the Salesforce REST API. Also available for other REST API operations (beyond records) when needed.
Use for: - Creating records (POST against the sobjects endpoint) - Updating records (PATCH against the sobjects endpoint with the record Id) - Deleting records (DELETE against the sobjects endpoint with the record Id) - Other Salesforce REST API endpoints that modify data or invoke services
NOT for: - Reading/querying records — use QueryRecordsWithSoql (handles SELECT and GROUP BY properly). - Data Cloud data — use QueryDataCloud (SQL) or ExploreDataCloud. - Metadata deployment — use CallMetadataApi or CallToolingApi. - External (non-Salesforce) APIs — this action targets the current org's REST endpoints only.
Always use the LATEST stable Salesforce REST API version in the URL path. Never use a placeholder. If unsure of the exact version, default to v64.0 or higher.
Before creating/updating custom objects, confirm object and field API names via ExploreOrgSchema — never guess.
